title: Observed stint reset state
summary: Infer current stint starts from tyre-life drops, compound changes, or current pit-stop flags and add causal stint-age features.
rationale: Stint-state variants were explored with mixed results but remain operationally relevant. A clean reset detector may capture pit-cycle timing better than raw `Stint` alone.
implementation_hint: Within each race-driver sequence, mark a reset when `TyreLife` decreases, compound changes, `Stint` increases, or current `PitStop` is active. Add observed stint number, laps since observed stint start, prior stint length if known from past rows, and current stint progress ratios.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Do not use future stint endpoints. Prior stint length is only safe after a reset has already been observed.
